reviews.comment:
Una sola isla funciona con un pobre estacionado q no da abasto ... colas innecesarias x mano izquierda de la 16 q es una calle bastante concurrida ... nunca funciona la app

(Translated by Google)
Only one island is functioning, with a poor parking attendant who can't keep up... unnecessary queues on the left side of 16th Street, which is quite busy... the app never works
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17283777982574224322/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtOV95YjRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si te sobra tiempo y te gusta hacer colas, este es el mejor lugar. Cola para cargar nafta, cola para inflar los neumaticos, etc. La ubicación de la máquina de calibrar neumaticos es mala, no permite una cola ordenada y se producen discusiones. La atención no fue buena.

(Translated by Google)
If you have plenty of time and enjoy waiting in lines, this is the place for you. There's a line for gas, a line for tire inflation, and so on. The tire inflation machine is poorly located, making it difficult to form an orderly line and leading to arguments. The service was also poor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17283777982574224322/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtOGRfWTRnRRAB
